sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n27082" key="dimoiriai=os" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῐμοιρ-ιαῖος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n27082.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of two-thirds,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">μῆκος</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1165.tlg001:162:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Apollod.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Poliorc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">162.7</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
